case_title: NETWORK COMMERCIAL SERVICE,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORP. vs. SYLVESTER SUN IND/DBA ASA PROCESSING LAB DBA et al

NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY BERNARD L WEINER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-23-2000 CONTINUED FROM NOV-08-2000 TO JAN-10-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
